title: Gerudoku Faithful: Fresh Animations Add-On
description: A Gerudoku Faithful Add-On that adds support for Fresh Animations
body:
![Gerudoku Faithful Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72595501098fcb621b531749f7ea95639c9f6d6c.jpeg) ![An image of the words Add On](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/816b3eb5b087f43cefd0975e915a041a8539248a.png)

**About**:
------------
This add-on adds support for Fresh Animations to Gerudoku Faithful.

Most mobs in this add-on have at least partial animation support, I edited a few of the models to better match the mob textures in Gerudoku, and others I edited textures to match the Fresh Animations models.
though some just didn't look right no matter what I did, so those have no additional support.

All models in this add-on are modified versions of the Fresh Animations models, they do not function without the Fresh Animations pack.


**Requirements**
------------------------------

**Fresh Animations**
- https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations

**Gerudoku Faithful**
- https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gerudoku-faithful


**Optifine or Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features**

**Optifine**
- https://www.optifine.net/downloads

**Entity Model Features**
- https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

**Entity Texture Features**
- https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures
